scripts.db:migrations:plan: npm run db:build && node packages/db/dist/cli.js plan
scripts.db:migrations:check: npm run db:build && node packages/db/dist/cli.js check
scripts.db:migrations:status: npm run db:build && node packages/db/dist/cli.js status
scripts.db:migrations:status:live: npm run db:build && node packages/db/dist/cli.js status --live
scripts.db:migrations:apply:dry-run: npm run db:build && node packages/db/dist/cli.js apply --dry-run
scripts.db:migrations:apply:live:dry-run: npm run db:build && node packages/db/dist/cli.js apply --live --dry-run
scripts.db:migrations:apply:live: npm run db:build && node packages/db/dist/cli.js apply --live --confirm
scripts.db:migrations:smoke:live: npm run db:migrations:status:live && npm run db:migrations:apply:live:dry-run

db:migrations:apply:dry-run && npm run check:supabase-types && npm run lint && tsc -b --noEmit && npm run db:build && npm run api:build && npm run build && npm run test:auth-runtime && npm run test:access-contract && npm run test:backend-contract && npm run test:db-contract && npm run test:db-migrations && npm run test:api && npm run test:admin-runtime-frontend && npm run test:admin-access-review-frontend && npm run test:admin-access-grants-frontend && npm run test:admin-operations-frontend && npm run test:admin-audit-frontend && npm run test:admin-incidents-frontend && npm run smoke:self-hosted-health-readiness:run && npm run smoke:self-hosted-graceful-shutdown:run && npm run smoke:self-hosted-request-guardrails:run && npm run run smoke:self-hosted-admin-access-grants:run && npm run smoke:self-hosted-admin-operations:run && npm run smoke:self-hosted-admin-incidents:run && npm run smoke:self-hosted-auth-api:run && npm run scripts.test:api: npm run contracts:build && vitest run --config apps/api/vitest.config.ts
scripts.smoke:e2e:run: E2E_USE_WEB_SERVER=1 playwright test e2e/smoke-core.spec.ts e2e/offer-detail-access.spec.ts e2e/offer-detail-runtime.spec.ts e2e/offer-catalog-detail-flow.spec.ts e2e/offers-catalog-paging.spec.ts e2e/suppliers-directory-paging.spec.ts e2e/supplier-profile-detail.spec.ts e2e/supplier-directory-profile-flow.spec.ts e2e/profile-legacy-redirects.spec.ts e2e/account-personal-save-enter-focus.spec.ts e2e/account-personal-autosave-no-focus-steal.spec.ts e2e/account-personal-validation-focus.spec.ts e2e/account-workspace-sections.spec.ts e2e/account-company-edit-contract.spec.ts e2e/account-branches-crud.spec.ts e2e/account-products-crud.spec.ts e2e/account-meta-regions-crud.spec.ts e2e/account-notifications-editing.spec.ts e2e/supplier-profile-access.spec.ts e2e/supplier-locked-i18n.spec.ts e2e/suppliers-no-horizontal-overflow.spec.ts e2e/blog-mobile-locale-390.spec.ts --project=chromium
scripts.account:reports:run: npm run smoke:e2e:account-company:report:run && node scripts/copy-account-report-pack.mjs account-company-save-flow && npm run smoke:e2e:account-products:report:run && node scripts/copy-account-report-pack.mjs account-products-save-flow
scripts.smoke:e2e:account-reports: npm run build && npm run account:reports:run && npm run account:reports:verify-suite && npm run account:reports:summary -- --company-root account-report-packs/account-company-save-flow --products-root account-report-packs/account-products-save-flow
scripts.ci:full: npm run ci:core && npm run smoke:e2e:frontend-no-supabase-env && npm run smoke:e2e:self-hosted-access-runtime && npm run smoke:e2e:self-hosted-auth-frontend && npm run smoke:e2e:admin-runtime-status && npm run smoke:e2e:admin-access-review && npm run smoke:e2e:admin-access-grants && npm run smoke:e2e:admin-operations && npm run smoke:e2e:admin-audit-events && npm run smoke:e2e:admin-incidents && npm run smoke:e2e:admin-incident-detail && npm run smoke:e2e:admin-incident-execution-queue && npm run smoke:e2e && npm run smoke:e2e:account-reports
scripts.test:account-workspace: vitest run src/lib/account-api.test.ts src/lib/supplier-directory-api.test.ts src/lib/supplier-directory-view.test.ts src/pages/account/Account.test.tsx src/pages/account/Account.editable.test.tsx
scripts.test:supplier-directory-frontend: vitest run src/lib/supplier-directory-api.test.ts src/lib/supplier-directory-view.test.ts src/lib/use-supplier-directory.test.tsx src/pages/Suppliers.test.tsx src/pages/Suppliers.searchAccess.test.tsx src/pages/Suppliers.i18n.test.tsx src/pages/__tests__/SupplierProfile.access.test.tsx
scripts.test:offer-catalog-frontend: vitest run src/lib/offer-catalog-api.test.ts src/lib/catalog-api.boundary.test.ts src/lib/use-offer-catalog.test.tsx src/lib/use-offer-detail.test.tsx src/pages/Offers.catalogPaging.test.tsx
scripts.smoke:self-hosted-auth-observability: npm run api:build && npm run smoke:self-hosted-auth-observability:run
